name: nan-hash-canonicalization
description: Canonicalize NaN bit patterns in __hash__ for IEEE 754 float tensors to ensure hash stability. Use when: (1) a tensor's __hash__ uses bitcast of float values but NaN-containing tensors produce non-deterministic hashes, (2) different NaN payloads or sign bits produce different hash values for semantically identical NaN content, (3) follow-up to fixing float hash precision with bitcast (e.g. after mojo-hash-bitcast-floats).
